title: Retrieval Review: Attribute-Driven Styling
summary: Retrieval Review: Attribute-Driven Styling retrieves prior skills in an original changed value grammar URL and application-state constraints scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css attribute presence value, css attribute token language, css attribute substrings, css data aria state in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed value grammar URL and application-state constraints artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Volunteer Shift Deck attribute-state work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the attribute-driven styling system here. */
